turns.question: Is there any room to negotiate on this price? You're asking seventy.
turns.questionKo: 이 가격 좀 흥정 가능해요? 70달러 부르시는 거잖아요.
turns.answer: Maybe a little, I could do sixty instead of seventy.

turns.question: Would you go any lower than that, say fifty?
turns.questionKo: 그거보다 더 낮게, 한 50 정도는 안 돼요?
turns.answer: I can't go that low, but I could do sixty-five.

turns.question: What if I pay in cash right now, would that help?
turns.questionKo: 지금 바로 현금으로 내면 도움이 될까요?
turns.answer: Yeah, cash works, I'll drop it to fifty-five for that.

turns.question: That works for me. Can you throw in free delivery too?
turns.questionKo: 좋아요. 무료 배송도 껴주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: Sure, I can waive the delivery fee since you're paying cash.

turns.question: Perfect, so we're settled at fifty-five with free delivery?
turns.questionKo: 좋아요, 그럼 55달러에 무료 배송으로 합의된 거죠?
turns.answer: Exactly, fifty-five it is, delivery included.

turns.question: Deal. When can you have it delivered by?
turns.questionKo: 좋아요, 그럼 언제까지 배송해 주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: I can get it to you by tomorrow afternoon.

turns.question: What's your best price on the pair of these?
turns.questionKo: 이거 한 켤레 최저가가 얼마예요?
turns.answer: My best price is ninety, and that's already a deal.

turns.question: Would you consider forty-five each if I buy the pair?
turns.questionKo: 한 켤레 사면 개당 45달러로 해주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: I could do forty-five, that's the lowest I can go per pair.
turns.answerKo: 45달러로 해드릴 수 있어요, 그게 켤레당 최저가예요.

turns.question: Is there a discount if I buy two pairs instead of just one?
turns.questionKo: 한 켤레 말고 두 켤레 사면 할인돼요?
turns.answer: Yeah, buying two pairs brings it down to eighty each pair.
turns.answerKo: 네, 두 켤레 사시면 켤레당 80달러로 내려가요.

turns.question: Can we split the difference and call it seventy-five each?
turns.questionKo: 중간에서 타협해서 개당 75달러로 하면 안 될까요?
turns.answer: Let's meet at eighty, that's fair for both of us.
turns.answerKo: 80달러로 합의하죠, 그게 서로 공평한 것 같아요.

turns.question: Alright, eighty works. Is there flexibility if I skip the warranty?
turns.questionKo: 네, 80달러 좋아요. 보증 안 받으면 좀 더 조정 가능해요?
turns.answer: Yeah, without the warranty it's ten dollars less per pair.
turns.answerKo: 네, 보증 빼면 켤레당 10달러 더 싸져요.

turns.question: Let's do that then, no warranty, seventy each.
turns.questionKo: 그럼 그렇게 할게요, 보증 없이 개당 70달러로요.
turns.answer: Deal, seventy each it is, no warranty included.

turns.question: Can I get a better deal if I refer a friend to you too?
turns.questionKo: 친구 소개해 드리면 더 좋은 조건 받을 수 있어요?
turns.answer: Absolutely, you'd both get ten percent off your next order.
turns.answerKo: 그럼요, 두 분 다 다음 주문에서 10% 할인받으실 수 있어요.

turns.question: That's great, I'll definitely send some people your way.
turns.questionKo: 좋네요, 꼭 사람들 소개해 드릴게요.
turns.answer: I appreciate that, word of mouth means a lot to me.

turns.question: Is ninety-five negotiable at all on this piece?
turns.questionKo: 이거 95달러 좀 흥정 가능해요?
turns.answer: A little, I could do ninety flat for you.

turns.question: Would you go lower if I took it today, right now?
turns.questionKo: 오늘 바로 사면 더 낮춰주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: Sure, same-day purchase gets you five off, so eighty-five.

turns.question: Can we agree on a round number then, like eighty?
turns.questionKo: 그럼 딱 떨어지게 80달러로 합의할까요?
turns.answer: That works for me, let's just call it eighty even.

turns.question: Is there any discount available for returning customers like me?
turns.questionKo: 저 같은 재구매 고객한테 할인 있어요?
turns.answer: Yes, returning customers get an automatic ten percent off too.

turns.question: Oh nice, so that would bring it down even further then?
turns.questionKo: 오 좋네요, 그럼 거기서 더 내려가는 거예요?
turns.answer: Right, with that discount it comes to seventy-two.

turns.question: That's a great price, I'll take it at seventy-two.
turns.questionKo: 좋은 가격이네요, 72달러에 살게요.
turns.answer: Perfect, I'll get that wrapped up for you right now.

turns.question: Would you accept store credit instead of cash for a future purchase?
turns.questionKo: 현금 대신 나중에 쓸 수 있는 매장 크레딧으로 받아주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: I can offer a bit extra if you take store credit instead.
turns.answerKo: 매장 크레딧으로 받으시면 좀 더 얹어드릴 수 있어요.

turns.question: Actually, cash works better for me this time, thanks.
turns.questionKo: 사실 이번엔 현금이 더 편해서요, 감사합니다.
turns.answer: No problem at all, cash it is then, seventy-two total.

turns.question: Is there room to negotiate the delivery fee as well?
turns.questionKo: 배송비도 좀 조정 가능해요?
turns.answer: A little, I can cut the delivery fee in half for you.
turns.answerKo: 조금은요, 배송비 절반으로 깎아 드릴 수 있어요.

turns.question: That would help a lot, let's do that then.
turns.questionKo: 그럼 정말 도움 될 것 같아요, 그렇게 해주세요.
turns.answer: Sounds good, I'll adjust the total before you check out.
turns.answerKo: 네, 결제 전에 총액 조정해 드릴게요.
